CustomField.description: Number of days from NEPA process start to the statutory or typical regulatory deadline for permits of this type. Copied to nepa_required_permit__c.nepa_statutory_deadline_days__c at record creation for SLA calculation. Values sourced from CEQ/NEPA guidance and agency processing time baselines.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Statutory or typical processing days for this permit type. Used to calculate the SLA due date when a permit instance record is created.
CustomField.label: Statutory Deadline (Days)
